Notes and Conferences Because you'll want to keep the other players in the dark about your activities, you'll often ‘want to communicate with the gamemaster privately. There are two ways to do so: pass him a note, or take him into another room for 1 private conference. Ina private conference, you can speak and exchange ideas freely. However, you are ‘monopolizing the gamemaster’s attention. Do this too much and the other players will re sent it. Moreover, if everyone begins asking for frequent private conferences, you'll spend ‘most of your time waiting for the latest con ference to end, and you'll resent it. Con- ferences slow things dawn, so ask for them sparingly. Note-passing is a more efficient method of secret communication, and doesn't interrupt play. On the other hand, writing a note is slow work, and there's a limit to how much a note can say, Stil, whenever feasible, write notes instead of asking for conferences. ‘The higher your treason point total, the less likely The Computer is to grant you equip- ‘ment, comply with your requests for informa- tion, or believe anything you tel it.
